claim: The operator-hub matrix has intrinsic geometric structure beyond random

floor1.description: 9 canonical operators x 236 hubs, edge count from cross_domain_edges

floor2.description: 81 op-pairs x 236 hubs, confidence-weighted (HIGH=1.0, MED=0.7, LOW=0.4)
floor2.note: Floor 2: eff rank 1.56 < null 3.76, p=0.0000. CONC/HIER corr=0.9538.

floor3.description: 131 traditions x hubs, FILLED=1 NA=-1 EMPTY=0

sparsity_honesty: Floor 1 has 157 nonzero cells (7.4% fill), not the 60 estimated. Rank is full (9/9) for both real and null -- rank alone is uninformative at this shape. However, EFFECTIVE rank (SV entropy) is 2.58 vs null 6.94 (p<0.001), meaning the SV spectrum is highly concentrated. This is genuine low-dimensional structure: TRUNCATE and DISTRIBUTE dominate the edge distribution. Floor 2 CONC/HIER correlation is 0.9538 (down from 1.0 pre-sanitization but still high) -- most hubs are FILLED for both operators at LOW confidence, masking differentiation. The claimed 0.2781 correlation may reference a different computation (e.g., edge-count Floor 1 level where it is 0.4244).
evidence_summary: Floor 1: eff rank 2.58 < null 6.94, p=0.0000. | Floor 2: eff rank 1.56 < null 3.76, p=0.0000. CONC/HIER corr=0.9538. | Floor 3: eff rank 4.46 < null 41.14, p=0.0000.
caveats: Floor 1 has 157 nonzero cells, not the 60 originally estimated. The resolution-to-hub mapping successfully placed all 1314 canonical-operator edges.
CONC/HIER correlation at Floor 2 is 0.9538, NOT 0.2781 as stated. The 0.2781 may refer to a different pairing or metric. At Floor 1 (edge counts), the correlation is 0.4244.

Floor 2 low effective rank (1.56) is partly because 76.8% of cells are filled -- most rows look similar (dominated by LOW confidence fills). Low-rank structure in a near-full matrix may reflect uniformity of fill rather than meaningful geometry.
Floor 3 result (eff rank 4.46 vs null 41.14) is the strongest signal: traditions cluster into ~4-5 archetypes in how they engage impossibility hubs. This is the most interpretable geometric finding.

All three floors pass the null comparison. But Floor 2's near-uniform fill and Floor 1's operator-dominance pattern mean the 'geometry' is largely driven by highly unequal operator activity (TRUNCATE=450 edges, QUANTIZE=2).
